title: KnowledgeCandidate
description: Contract for a distiller knowledge-candidate (what a Distiller LLM or the deterministic stub may emit) AND the persisted-public KU shape. Mirrors kdl.model.candidate_from_json(). HARD: every candidate MUST carry >=1 provenance (each with kind+ref) or the no-LLM Ingestor drops it (audited event='privacy_filter' reason='no_provenance'). CODE candidates additionally require repo+file_path+symbol. Bodies/quotes here are plaintext only at the in-memory candidate stage; they are NEVER persisted plaintext (the store encrypts them to *_cipher BLOBs).

source_type.description: Which of the four knowledge sources this unit belongs to.

title.description: Short human-readable title of the knowledge unit.

body.description: Knowledge body. PLAINTEXT in-memory only; persisted encrypted.

taint.description: Declared taint; combined (MAX) with redaction-derived taint at ingest. Never washes down.

public_ok.description: Whether the operator marked this safe for outward use. Default false.

provenance.description: Traceable source pointers. At least one is mandatory; provenance-empty units are locked to DRAFT and cannot back an answer.

ref.description: The pointer: git SHA / url / dingtalk msgId / file path.

quote.description: Redacted excerpt. PLAINTEXT in-memory only; persisted encrypted as quote_cipher. NEVER surfaced raw in a draft.

file_path.description: CODE-only: path of the file containing the symbol.

symbol.description: CODE-only: symbol name whose behaviour/contract this KU captures.

content_hash.description: CODE-only: sha256 hex of the symbol's source slice (drift detection).

line_range.description: CODE-only: [start, end] line numbers of the symbol's slice.
